224b800b-81ad-4bca-a11c-a9578f86d7ba.speak: The Else path is triggered when a user doesn't say one of the pre-defined responses you set in your choice block.

82faa43a-678c-49b7-8c64-c4772080a013.speak: Welcome to Voiceflow's starter template! Are you ready to start building?

9a7053f6-f65a-4927-9d29-17170621b608.speak: You said no. Oh no! Come back when you're ready to start building your Alexa skill!

ed84cb56-6042-4a02-8eae-bc0e59d165c9.speak: You said yes. Let's get building your skill!

218a80c0-b4b3-47f4-b05f-f12abd6c2ba3.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! <break time = "50ms"/>Your new number is {sub1_num}. Now, we are going to stream 3 different numbers between 1 and 3 in a loop. <break time = "50ms"/>There should be no duplicates.<break time = "50ms"/>

78038395-2a32-4b0e-9336-cf5848d65b6d.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>You are in subflow one. The global variable number you set in the ROOT flow was {root_num}, correct?<break time = "50ms"/>

afaac5ec-904e-4ff0-b331-fd0621c9e6be.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! Now, say a number to set a local variable that will be multiplied by 5. <break time = "50ms"/>

fe776e11-9b1e-4b55-ac43-5778ee9b80dc.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! Captured your number as {sub1_num}. <break time = "50ms"/>Now multiplying by 5.<break time = "50ms"/>

9f9248a9-6ee5-40b5-b4d9-352ff8cf83c3.speak: Success. You are in the help command. Now exiting and returning to the ROOT flow. Please listen to the audio block, and say anything after.

47a6228a-4860-4cc7-88c1-8838f2bf8d85.speak: We are about to stop the skill. Please reopen to test resume remprompts.

0c239c57-1104-4677-b77b-267a136617b3.speak: Success. <break time = "1s"/>Entering second stream block  with M4U looping sound. After several loops, please pause, play, and then say next.

51c0afcd-bf82-4a95-a650-43a41506b051.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! Response is {api}. <break time = "50ms"/> Successfully played API response in variable. <break time = "50ms"/>Now entering subflow three.

75bcb071-385d-449d-8596-0d6e322bcea1.speak: <break time = "1s"/>Success. Now looping back, ask for next.

c8fa1167-f123-4313-af5a-d75b10ab4e65.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Successfully entered subflow two. <break time = "50ms"/>Testing the API block now. Response should say in transit.

e4d20693-50b4-41b2-9da6-f552aac6e440.speak: Paused. Now ask to play. When the sound comes back on, ask for previous.

320c8b87-bef2-40f6-8c58-f9a5df89ba6b.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! Captured your number as {root_num} as a global variable. <break time = "50ms"/>Entering subflow one.<break time = "50ms"/>

4cd40c71-95a6-4a84-954e-1ca86876307f.speak: this is a card block demo

55d237bb-87c0-4244-99d5-b76fa6992adb.speak: Success. We have returned to the root. The local variables have been transferred and the result is {local}. <break time = "50ms"/> Let's test the stop command. After, please reopen the skill to test resume prompts. Say the wake word followed by 'stop'.<audio src="https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.getstoryflow.audio.production/1545512939725-jvmbwzqo-3.mp3"/>

6073937d-472a-473a-b469-411ae3ca7a2a.speak: Success. <break time = "50ms"/> Now let's try duplicate flow commands. Entering a duplicate of Subflow one.

<voice name="Brian"><break time = "50ms"/>Random Yes Answer Two in Brian voice. <break time = "50ms"/></voice>
<voice name="Kimberly"><break time = "50ms"/>Random answer three in kim voice.<break time = "50ms"/></voice>

876d6f46-3a9b-4f8b-965a-df0a3d1dad71.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>About to test random speaking in different voices, followed by an audio clip. <break time = "50ms"/>

9099e3d7-4ec6-463c-b467-36d780026a6f.speak: Now, let's do this all again. Please say the wake word followed by the 'home' command. I will say gibberish until you do.<voice name="Mizuki">lololololololololololololololohahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah</voice>

95632aab-8673-4b0f-9ca4-5353a44c8103.speak: That is not a number. Please say a valid number now. <break time = "50ms"/>

97ca06b2-74c3-497e-90a6-31db41c0337d.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>You have hitten the else. <break time = "50ms"/>

bd91e3e2-e5e2-4c98-83a4-52de16a8f36c.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! What is your user name?<break time = "50ms"/>

c93b37e1-761c-4570-82cb-2e3f84491f01.speak: <break time="50ms"/> A speak block with audio is about to start playing. When it does, please say the Help command.

card.title: Heres some stories just for you

eaf59f39-70df-4ff2-aeff-463b64ceac63.speak: Hi there, do you think this skill can pass the Tyler Test?

f78818f0-f23a-4ea0-9889-d39e9401c24e.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Success! Captured variable as {name}. Let's test flows and logic. <break time = "50ms"/>Say a number.

1db5ab28-9c97-4a38-9c54-08aac968f317.speak: You are in the subflow help command block. <break time="0.5s"/>

0e0f9ce6-1dc6-45a6-aebe-d1cb62b3ffbf.speak: Now to test local jump commands. Please say the home command. I will play audio until you do.<audio src="https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.getstoryflow.audio.production/1546378625608-lfhhe4bj-p-4.mp3"/>

2657e3c7-26e2-4ea8-b1b6-ba563b10bbea.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Successfully entered Subflow One copy.  Please say the help command. You should hear that it is a subflow help command. I will play audio until you do.<audio src="https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.getstoryflow.audio.production/1545513362361-lyf8zdoi-1.mp3"/><audio src="https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.getstoryflow.audio.production/1545513372556-lyf8zdoi-1.mp3"/>

30c44f84-6299-4414-8df6-de375ca534cf.speak: Success. Please ignore the following request for a jump and help command.

b6a8a765-bad4-4166-a55d-9b6a8fdff12e.speak: Congratulations! You have completed the Tyler Test. This version of Voiceflow is Tyler complete. Push when ready.

07865f31-a641-4ef3-bffc-71edde7776e0.speak: Success. <break time = "50ms"/>You triggered the choice block and not the intent block.

09aa6ebc-4e9b-428c-bcaf-e7cd182f703c.speak: Success. <break time = "50ms"/>. Time to test the combine block. Now combining three different audio clips.

16b944a6-8554-4a2f-bf59-f51ad6556dfb.speak: Success. <break time = "1s"/>Let's try a local command that does not return. <break time = "1s"/>Please say the command phrase tyler test. I will play audio until you do.<audio src="https://s3.amazonaws.com/com.getstoryflow.audio.production/1545512011011-storyflowfeedbackrequest.mp3"/>

2bbb422e-b483-4778-95c7-13f35aae5c1e.speak: Intent block broken. The pre built Amazon intent for yes or no did not trigger.

2d34d5f5-5a3e-44dd-9086-f5928ced08b1.speak: Success. You triggered the custom intent for US cities, and your favorite city of {city} was captured in the city slot and transferred to a variable. <break time = "50ms"/> Time to test catch all vs intent system clashes. Please say yes or no.

4c5aa848-5672-490d-b46e-3c576c3b1db9.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Audio combine successful. Now, we are going to test variable mapping through capturing a local variable, and mapping it up to the root. Say a number.

50131ff6-775a-4695-a21e-468157165afa.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Email sent. Did Tyler get an email with his favorite US city in the subject line?

70051c34-fdd5-4ade-a0d9-eda03f0ac0c7.speak: <break time = "50ms"/>Entered subflow 3. <break time = "50ms"/> Testing Amazon intents. Please say yellow or green.

8bfb6839-b538-4370-b049-5a84066cf046.speak: <break time = "50ms"/> Now let's test the email block. Sending an email to Tyler.

9d2d2142-dfeb-4a05-9854-387e7a489c57.speak: Success. You triggered the Amazon green intent. Now to test custom intents and slots. <break time = "50ms"/> Please say what your favorite US city is.

e354ef99-5339-4f17-9c02-13a885f5eb44.speak: The number {local} was captured. Going back up to the ROOT flow.<break time = "50ms"/>

e3b053d6-c201-4a5b-9d4b-91c1584898b1.speak: You hit the catch all value. Broken intent block.

fd1e75e5-dec8-4525-befa-6816dd194957.speak: Success. You triggered the Amazon yellow intent. <break time = "50ms"/> Now to test custom intents and slots. <break time = "50ms"/> Please say what your favorite US city is.
